race.comment: LEAFICE (7) gets the blinkers on first time today following a 3.3L defeat over this track and trip last time out. She maps for a lovely run once again for Chris Parnham and she looks ready to improve now. Can get back to her best form and notch up her maiden win. BIT TIRED ACTUALLY (6) resumes here off an 81-day break with a sound trial at Lark Hill under her belt. Fiore will need some luck from the wide alley, but she ticks plenty of boxes and she can resume on a positive note. DUOPOLY (8) comes through a good race at Belmont on debut. Out in trip now looks a big tick for her and she should map in a similar position to last start. Can play a leading role. SPONGE CAKE (10) comes through the same race as DUOPOLY and gets Pike in the saddle now. Can play a leading role. COSMIC GEM (1) can be in the finish third-up.
